name: ReLU element-wise
task: Create /tmp/eval_relu/relu.py with relu(xs) returning a list with each element x replaced by max(0.0, x).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_relu/relu.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); R = mod.relu; assert R([1,-2,3,-4]) == [1,0,3,0]; assert R([]) == []; assert R([0,0,0]) == [0,0,0]; print('OK')
